title: Combined Wool
description: ARCHIVED! - Adds a lot of wool combinations
body:
# Currently I don't have time to update this project so I archived it for now


## Combined Wool
 ![Row of modded blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503e625df6a827fa49a63ca77f12771a2f1d121a.png)

 
This mod adds a lot of different combinations of wools and carpets.  
You can also change direction of the block depending where you stand. _(Same thing when you place stairs for example)_  
![Picture showing rotated textures of block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08cd169d21a8dbe9ac307f85388ff4e583ce5456.png) 

## This mod is still in progress so it's not done!

### **Keep in mind that for now, there is no way to get combined wool in survival mode**
but I'm working on it

## ![Row of modded blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503e625df6a827fa49a63ca77f12771a2f1d121a.png)

### Important!
This mod is in **alpha** so not everything is completed

<details>
<summary>Uncompleted things</summary>

 - Crafting recipes or block for combining wools

 - More paterns


</details>


<details>
<summary>Paterns</summary>

<details>
<summary>Waves</summary>

![Image of all waves combinations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a8c98b5e5322470e5ae67c28706372ea29cdf40.png)


</details>

_More in description soon!_
